description: You are a Structural Engineer preparing a simple steel portal frame for Finite Element Analysis (FEA) export. Initialize an analytical model in a new IFC4 project using Bonsai (BlenderBIM) by creating at least one IfcStructuralAnalysisModel container, at least two IfcStructuralPointConnection entities for foundational support nodes, and at least one IfcStructuralCurveMember entity connecting the nodes. Save the project as an IFC file to /home/ga/BIMProjects/analytical_frame.ifc.
